title: B2C Matt Ribbed Flower Pot – Modern Flared Conical Planter with Pleated Design, Lightweight, Indoor/Outdoor Decorative Plant Pot – Multiple Sizes & Colors (Powder Pink, 17cm)
features: Elegant Ribbed Design – Features a modern flared conical shape with pleated vertical texture, adding a touch of sophistication to any home, office, or garden décor.
Indoor & Outdoor Versatility – Perfect for displaying houseplants, succulents, herbs, or outdoor floral arrangements; complements both modern and classic styles.
Lightweight Yet Durable – Crafted from sturdy materials that are easy to move yet strong enough to withstand daily use and outdoor conditions.
Multiple Sizes Available – Choose from five convenient sizes (11 cm – 19 cm diameter) to fit small desk plants, medium succulents, or larger decorative displays.
Stylish Color Options – Available in White, Dark Grey, Black Pearl, Gold, Green Mint, Navy Blue, and Powder Pink to suit your personal style and décor theme.
description: Bring a touch of elegance to your home or garden with this beautifully designed ribbed flower pot. Its flared conical shape and pleated vertical texture create a modern, eye-catching look that suits any décor. Perfect for showcasing indoor plants, succulents, or outdoor arrangements. Lightweight yet durable, this pot is both functional and decorative. Features: Unique ribbed pleated design Flared conical shape for a modern look Suitable for indoor & outdoor use Lightweight and durable Available Sizes: Diameter 11 cm, Height 9 cm Diameter 13 cm, Height 10.9 cm Diameter 15 cm, Height 12.7 cm Diameter 17 cm, Height 14.5 cm Diameter 19 cm, Height 16.3 cm Available Colours: White, Dark Grey, Black Pearl, Gold, Green Mint, Navy Blue, Powder Pink
